signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation confirmed at 2.2% YoY, up from 2.0% but below 2.3-2.4% forecasts** | YES | HIGH confidence

South Korea's consumer price index rose 2.2% year-on-year in March 2026, accelerating from February's 2.0% but undershooting market consensus of 2.3-2.4%, driven by oil prices offset by government fuel caps and food vouchers.[1][2][4] Monthly CPI increased 0.3%, bel
